title: Joint Camp Precision Training
intro: A controlled sniper-training exercise at base camp. Move carefully, confirm your positions, and respond to command injects under pressure.

onCheck.message: Spot Check in progress. Confirming whether your team is inside base camp control.

onSuccess.message: Spot Check clear. Base camp control confirmed.

onFail.message: Spot Check caught the team outside control. Fifteen minute penalty applied.

steps.title: Report to Base Camp
steps.text: Training begins with a control check. Move to base camp and confirm your team is inside the safe zone before the exercise opens.

steps.title: Recover Range Markers
steps.text: Four range markers have been placed around the training area. Claim any three to prove your team can move, observe, and report under field conditions.

steps.title: Establish Overwatch
steps.text: Move to the assigned overwatch position. This is the final observation point before command injects the live decision drill.

steps.title: Command Decision Drill
steps.text:
Command inject: your team has been exposed by an observer. Choose your response.

Type 1 to evacuate the area.
Type 2 to confront head on.

steps.title: Evacuate the Area
steps.text: Break contact and create distance from the overwatch position. Move at least 300 meters away within 5 minutes.

steps.title: Confront Head On
steps.text: Advance to the opposing observer's position and complete the head-on engagement drill within 10 minutes.

steps.title: Training Passed
steps.text: Exercise complete. Your team made the call, completed the field requirement, and passed Joint Camp Precision Training.

steps.title: Training Failed
steps.text: Exercise failed. Your team did not complete the required action in time and must run the training again.
